scripts.build: bun run build:studio && bun run build:core
scripts.build:studio: bun run --filter @flexweave/studio build && bun run --filter @flexweave/studio-app build
scripts.check: ultracite check && bun run check:structure && bun run check:terms && bun run check:core && bun run check:studio
scripts.check:core: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy -p flexweave --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.check:studio: bun run --filter @flexweave/studio typecheck && bun run --filter @flexweave/studio-app typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:core && bun run test:studio
scripts.test:studio: bun run --filter @flexweave/studio test && bun run --filter @flexweave/studio-app test
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build && cargo doc -p flexweave --no-deps
